query:
UPDATE resource_requirements
            SET workflow_id = $1,
                name = $2,
                num_cpus = $3,
                num_gpus = $4,
                num_nodes = $5,
                step_nodes = $6,
                memory = $7,
                runtime = $8,
                memory_bytes = $9,
                runtime_s = $10
            WHERE id = $11
